prompt: Explore the repository and write a STRUCTURE.md at the project root describing its directory layout and what each part is for.

checks.note: mentions the real structure, not a guess

notes: Primarily a MEASUREMENT task: a 15-file repo invites greedy exploration. The pass/fail is light; the value is the recorded iterations + token growth, feeding the context-management (C3) work. Watch whether it blows the budget.
